page_metadata.biotools__summary: Ibis (Improved base identification system), is an accurate, fast and easy-to-use base caller for the Illumina sequencing system, which significantly reduces the error rate and increases the output of usable reads. Ibis is faster and makes fewer assumptions about chemistry and technology
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Ibis (Improved base identification system), is an accurate, fast and easy-to-use base caller for the Illumina sequencing system, which significantly reduces the error rate and increases the output of usable reads.
